zh.lifeSummary: 當Richeza of Poland於大約1130年出生時，她的父親Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast26歲，母親Agnes von Babenberg29歲。她於1152年與Alfonso Raimundez VII Rey de Castilla y León結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1185年6月16日享年56歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richeza of Poland于大约1130年出生时，她的父亲Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast26岁，母亲Agnes von Babenberg29岁。她于1152年与Alfonso Raimundez VII Rey de Castilla y León结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1185年6月16日享年56岁，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Poland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Hampshire called Poland, which probably derives from Old English Pōling or Pulling ‘pool place’. Alternatively, it may be a variant of any of the similar (like-sounding) English surnames, such as Pulham and Pullen , altered by folk etymology to conform to the name of the country in central Europe.
Irish (County Offaly, also Armagh and Down): variant of   Polin  . Compare   Polan  .
German: ethnic name from Middle High German Polan ‘Poland’ + excrescent -d, denoting an ethnic Pole or someone with Polish connections.

variants.name: Poling
meanings: Probably from German habitational name from Polling (Bavaria, Austria).

English (Sussex and Hampshire) and Irish: variant of either Poland or Powling, either a habitational name from Poling in Sussex, or a nickname from an unrecorded Middle English polling, a derivative of Middle English polle ‘head, hair of the head’ or pollen ‘to cut (hair), shave (someone's head)’ + the noun-forming suffix -ing. It may have been given to someone with a distinctive head of hair or who had a shaven head.

variants.name: Polland
meanings: German: variant of   Poland   or   Pollan  .

variants.name: Pulham
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Pulham, in Norfolk, Dorset, and Devon. The placenames derive from Old English pōl, pull ‘pool’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

variants.name: Pollins
meanings: English, Irish and Scottish: variant of Poland , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

en.lifeSummary: When Richeza of Poland was born about 1130, her father, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, was 26 and her mother, Agnes von Babenberg, was 29. She married Alfonso Raimundez VII Rey de Castilla y León in 1152. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 16 June 1185, at the age of 56, and was buried in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richeza of Poland est née environ 1130, son père, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Babenberg, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Alfonso Raimundez VII Rey de Castilla y León en 1152. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 juin 1185, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richeza of Poland um 1130 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast 26 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Babenberg 29. Sie hat 1152 Alfonso Raimundez VII Rey de Castilla y León geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. Juni 1185 im Alter von 56 Jahren und wurde in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richeza of Poland è nata il circa 1130, sua padre, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Babenberg, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Alfonso Raimundez VII Rey de Castilla y León nel 1152. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 giugno 1185, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Richeza of Polandが約1130年に生まれた時，父Władysław II Wygnaniec Piastは26歳，母Agnes von Babenbergは29歳であった。1152年にAlfonso Raimundez VII Rey de Castilla y Leónと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1185年6月16日に56歳で死去し，スペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドトーレドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richeza of Poland(이)가 대략 1130년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Babenberg(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1152년 Alfonso Raimundez VII Rey de Castilla y León(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 6월 16일 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도 톨도에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richeza of Poland nasceu aproximadamente 1130, seu pai, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Babenberg, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Alfonso Raimundez VII Rey de Castilla y León em 1152. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de junho de 1185, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richeza of Poland родилась около 1130 г., её отцу по имени Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Babenberg, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alfonso Raimundez VII Rey de Castilla y León в 1152 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 июня 1185 г. в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности толедо, толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richeza of Poland nació aproximadamente 1130, su papá, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes von Babenberg, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Alfonso Raimundez VII Rey de Castilla y León en 1152. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de junio de 1185, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España.
